items.summary: In frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx, remove the three <span> elements identified by the following XPaths from the skill proficiency cards rendered in section 4: (1) /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1], (2) /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1], (3) /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[4]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1]. These are the first span elements inside the inner-most div of the first, second, and fourth skill cards respectively. Remove them from the rendered output entirely so they no longer appear on the page.
